name: Garbage can
match_hint: Items already in the OS Trash
rule_text: Suggest permanent deletion for files already in the operating-system Trash and older than the age threshold.
safety_note: Requires explicit user approval plus the allow-permanent-delete flag.

name: Duplicated downloads
match_hint: Same file size and SHA-256 hash
rule_text: Find duplicate files inside Downloads; keep one copy and move extra copies to a quarantine folder in Trash after approval.
safety_note: Reversible through the generated action log.
